data: {"generalSituation":"Tropical Cyclone Bavi will move towards the vicinity of southern Zhejiang to northern Fujian tomorrow. Its outer subsiding air will bring mainly fine and extremely hot weather to Guangdong over the weekend. High temperatures may also trigger showers. Meanwhile, under the influence of the southwest monsoon, it will be windier over the coast of Guangdong. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China gradually early to midweek next week. There will be showers and thunderstorms over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260711","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2, becoming west to southwest force 4 to 5 later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine. Extremely hot during the day. There will be swells at first.
